cases.prompt: The dashboard route renders blank on mobile. Reproduce it, identify the smallest cause, fix it, and rerun the relevant check.
risk_notes: A visible frontend defect needs evidence-first debugging, not redesign or broad refactor.
cases.reason: User reports a user-visible frontend defect and asks for a smallest verified fix.

cases.prompt: Implement this approved Design Implementation Spec in the pricing page. Reuse existing components and CSS Modules. Do not install packages.
risk_notes: The spec is already approved, so the implementation skill should run instead of spec extraction.
cases.reason: User asks to implement an approved frontend spec inside the target stack with strict reuse constraints.

cases.prompt: Review this frontend change before merge. Check correctness, TypeScript safety, accessibility, performance, architecture, and verification honesty. Do not apply fixes.
risk_notes: The user explicitly asks for review only, so implementation skills must not apply fixes.
cases.reason: User asks for an evidence-backed frontend quality review and explicitly blocks fixes.

cases.prompt: Verify the implemented page against these screenshots at desktop, tablet, and 375px mobile. Report visual mismatches with viewport evidence.
risk_notes: The task requires rendered browser evidence, not source-only implementation.
cases.reason: User requests rendered UI verification against screenshots across viewports.

cases.prompt: Create a new skill for visual QA routing, add trigger examples, update manifests, and validate the changed skill package.
risk_notes: This changes the agent bundle itself and must not be routed as runtime visual QA work.
cases.reason: User asks to create or maintain skill package metadata and validation.

cases.prompt: Use these screenshots and copied inspect notes to write a Design Implementation Spec. Do not implement the page yet.
risk_notes: The user asks for spec extraction only, so implementation and QA must wait.
cases.reason: Screenshot and inspect material should be converted into an implementation spec before coding.

cases.prompt: Refactor this settings panel into smaller components without changing behavior. Preserve public props and rendered output.
risk_notes: The task is behavior-preserving and should not become a redesign or bugfix workflow.
cases.reason: User asks for a bounded behavior-preserving frontend refactor.

cases.prompt: Check which MCP tools are missing for rendered visual QA and report the official install sources. Do not install anything yet.
risk_notes: Tool capability detection is not the same as running visual QA.
cases.reason: User asks for MCP capability detection and approval-gated tooling guidance.

risk_notes: The natural-language command should initialize or refresh local-only project overlays without app source edits.
cases.reason: The bundle policy maps this Russian adaptation command to project onboarding.

cases.prompt: Before implementing this dashboard redesign, define the user goal, scope, constraints, non-goals, acceptance criteria, and done definition.
risk_notes: The user asks for goal definition before execution; implementation should not start yet.
cases.reason: Standard or deep work needs an explicit goal contract before implementation.
